# Transtel Communications

> Global provider of enterprise communication infrastructure — PABX systems, Nurse Call, Voice Loggers, Voice Gateways, GPON fiber networks, and IP Telephones for demanding deployments worldwide.

Transtel Communications has delivered mission-critical communication technology to hospitals, hotels, governments, schools, and corporations for decades. Headquartered in Jupiter, Florida, USA, with offices in Taiwan, Australia, New Zealand, and Sri Lanka, Transtel operates as a global OEM and systems integrator specializing in on-premise, cloud-independent telephony infrastructure.

## Company

- **Full Name**: Transtel Communications
- **Website**: https://transtelcommunications.co
- **Email**: info@transtelcommunications.co
- **Headquarters**: 1562 Park Ln S, Jupiter, FL 33458, United States — Phone: +1 (561) 747-4466
- **Regional Offices**:
  - Taiwan: +886 922 570 628
  - Australia: (02) 9415 0100
  - New Zealand: +64 (9) 260 4009
  - Sri Lanka: +94 771 075 589
- **Social**: [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/TranstelGlobal) · [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@TranstelGlobal)

## Products

### PABX Systems
Private Automatic Branch Exchange systems for small businesses to large enterprises.
- [IPX-100](/product/PABX/IPX-100) — Compact PABX for small businesses
- [IPX-800](/product/PABX/IPX-800) — Scalable PABX for mid-sized enterprises
- [VP-500](/product/PABX/VP-500) — Robust voice platform
- [VP-3000](/product/PABX/VP-3000) — High-capacity enterprise voice server

### IP Telephones
Professional IP and analog telephone endpoints for offices, hotels, and campuses.
- [IPV-3786](/product/Telephone/IPV-3786) — High-end IP Video Phone
- [IP-77F1](/product/Telephone/IP-77F1) — Standard office IP Phone
- [IPV-78H](/product/Telephone/IPV-78H) — HD Voice IP Phone
- [IPV-72H](/product/Telephone/IPV-72H) — Entry-level IP Phone
- [IP-76](/product/Telephone/IP-76) — Basic business phone

### Nurse Call Systems
Hospital-grade patient communication systems compliant with healthcare regulations.
- [AH-99PS](/product/Nurse Call/AH-99PS) — Patient station unit
- [AH-99BN](/product/Nurse Call/AH-99BN) — Bathroom pull cord unit
- [AK-77](/product/Nurse Call/AK-77) — Corridor light indicator

### Voice Loggers
Multi-channel call recording for compliance, legal, and quality assurance.
- [VL-100](/product/Voice Logger/VL-100) — Single-channel logger
- [VL-400](/product/Voice Logger/VL-400) — Multi-channel enterprise logger

### Voice Gateways
Hardware gateways bridging analog/digital PSTN lines to IP networks.
- [VG-200](/product/Voice Gateway/VG-200) — Analog (FXO/FXS) to VoIP gateway
- [VG-400](/product/Voice Gateway/VG-400) — E1/T1 digital gateway

### GPON — Fiber Optic Networks
Gigabit Passive Optical Network infrastructure for campuses and multi-floor buildings.
- [OLT-1000](/product/GPON/OLT-1000) — Optical Line Terminal
- [ONT-500](/product/GPON/ONT-500) — Optical Network Terminal

## Industry Solutions

### [Hotels & Hospitality](/solution/hospitality)
End-to-end infrastructure connecting front desks, back offices, and guest rooms. GPON fiber-to-the-room (FTTR) reduces cabling by up to 80%. PABX integrates with PMS platforms such as Oracle Opera for automated check-in/out, wake-up calls, and real-time guest billing.

### [Hospitals & Healthcare](/solution/healthcare)
Mission-critical clinical communication with integrated Nurse Call and PABX. Multi-color corridor lights signal call priority. SIP integration routes patient alarms to roaming staff on wireless endpoints. Voice Gateways bridge legacy analog hospital infrastructure to modern IP networks.

### [Corporate Offices](/solution/corporate)
High-capacity PABX supporting thousands of concurrent SIP extensions across multi-site enterprises. Multi-channel Voice Loggers for QA and legal compliance. SIP trunking for cost reduction and E1/T1 gateways for carrier compatibility.

### [Government & Public Sector](/solution/government)
Fully on-premise, air-gappable PABX deployments with no cloud dependency. Auditable Voice Loggers with cryptographic immutability for legal compliance. GPON campus networks with EMI immunity — spans up to 20km from a single OLT.

### [Education & Schools](/solution/education)
Campus-wide telephony for classrooms, administration, and emergencies. Emergency IP paging for lockdown broadcasts. GPON backbone reduces cabling cost across sprawling campuses with zero-power passive splitters.

- [Transtel Billing](https://billing.transtelcommunications.co/) — Offline-first PABX call accounting desktop software for Windows
